summary: Coach Players Tracking (Iteration 94) - Backend 20/20 tests passed, Frontend all flows verified. New coach_players collection with full CRUD + transmit workflow. Admin/Manager can see ALL tables in JeuxBonsModal.
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ITER94_ prefix for cleanup identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coach Players feature fully implemented. Backend: POST /api/coach/players (create player), GET /api/coach/players (list with actor_role filter), POST /api/coach/players/{id}/consume (add consumption - parties/hourly modes), DELETE /api/coach/players/{id}/consume/{idx} (remove consumption), DELETE /api/coach/players/{id} (delete player), POST /api/coach/players/transmit (transmit to jeux_bons with [PlayerName] prefix in notes). GET /api/caisse/tables now accepts actor_role=admin/manager to return ALL tables. Frontend: CoachJeuxPage has 'Joueurs' tab (data-testid='coach-tab-players') with PlayersTrackerTab component. Add player form (data-testid='new-player-name', 'add-player-btn'), player cards with checkboxes (data-testid='player-select-{id}'), add-conso buttons (data-testid='add-conso-btn-{id}'), consumption form with parties/hourly toggle, submit-conso buttons (data-testid='submit-conso-{id}'). Selection banner shows total and 'Transmettre' button (data-testid='transmit-selected'). JeuxBonsModal shows ALL tables in dropdown for admin/manager.
